headline: Assessing Danaher (DHR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Undervalued Fair Value Estimate
summary: Danaher at a glance: business mix and recent stock performance Danaher (DHR) has a market value of about US$135.2b and last closed at US$196.19. Recent returns show a 2.7% move over the past day, with a 2.8% gain over the past week. Over the past month the stock shows a 1.3% decline, while the past 3 months reflect a 16.5% decline. Year to date, Danaher’s total return is a 14.8% decline, with a 1 year total return of 2.9%. On a longer view, Danaher’s 3 year total return stands at a 10.0%...
